overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character walking through a surreal, distorted urban environment resembling a melted or dreamlike version of a historic European city. The character navigates narrow passages between warped buildings and emerges into an open plaza approaching the Palais de Justice under bright daylight.

scene_state.functional_zone: distorted urban street between melting historic buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow distorted street between tall melting buildings with warped facades

entered.detail: tall distorted historic building with warped stone facade appearing to melt or sag
tall distorted building with dark weathered stone and deformed architectural details
piles of rubble and distorted ground formations scattered along the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a surreal narrow street flanked by towering, melting historic buildings with distorted architecture. The ground is asphalt with scattered debris mounds, and the sky is partially visible between the tall structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage with crosswalk between cliff face and building

events.description: passing over white striped crosswalk markings painted on the asphalt ground
emerging from shadowed narrow passage into brighter sunlight as the canyon opens ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the narrowing passage with a rock cliff on the right and tall building on the left

entered.detail: tall dark rock face replacing the building on the right side of the path
tall modern tower visible in the distance at the end of the passage

segments.scene_description: The path narrows into a canyon-like passage with a rock cliff on the right and the melted building on the left. The character crosses white striped markings on the ground and continues toward an opening where bright sunlight and a distant tower become visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza approaching the Palais de Justice with scaffolding

events.description: large text overlay 'PALAIS DE JUSTICE' appears on screen indicating the landmark location
approaching the large historic Palais de Justice building with visible metal scaffolding

agents.ego_description: walking across the open plaza toward the Palais de Justice building with a white car parked nearby

entered.detail: large classical stone building with tall columns and ornate facade
metal scaffolding framework attached to the front of the historic building
white sedan parked near the building entrance

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide plaza under a bright blue sky with scattered clouds. The character approaches the Palais de Justice, a large classical stone building with prominent scaffolding, while a white car sits parked to the right. The text 'PALAIS DE JUSTICE' appears as an overlay marking the location.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a surreal, distorted urban corridor that gradually opens into a bright, expansive city plaza. It begins by navigating a narrow street flanked by towering, melting historic buildings and asphalt littered with debris. As the path tightens into a canyon-like passage between a rock cliff and warped architecture, the camera crosses white striped markings and moves toward a distant glimmer of light. The scene then expands abruptly into a wide plaza under a bright blue sky, shifting from the claustrophobic distorted alley to an open space. Finally, the camera approaches the classical stone facade of the Palais de Justice, passing a parked white car as the building's scaffolding and name become clearly visible.
